game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Skul: The Hero Slayer:** Players control Skul, a tiny skeleton, through procedurally generated 2D platformer levels, using a virtual joystick for movement and virtual buttons for basic attacks, special abilities, and dashing. The core mechanic involves collecting and swapping between over 100 unique "skulls," each granting Skul a distinct moveset (e.g., melee, ranged) and a powerful special ability with a cooldown (e.g., 10 seconds). Defeated enemies drop "Dark Quartz" and random "items" that provide passive stat buffs like +15 attack or +5% critical chance, creating synergistic builds. Progression is run-based; players clear rooms and defeat bosses across multiple biomes, with death (HP reaching 0) resulting in the loss of all current run items and skulls. However, accumulated "Dark Quartz" can be spent at a central hub between runs to unlock permanent upgrades, such as increased starting gold or new item pool additions, making subsequent runs incrementally easier.
game_info.description: Control Skul, a brave skeleton warrior, through dangerous dungeon rooms filled with enemies. Collect unique skulls that transform your abilities, gather powerful items to enhance your stats, and earn Dark Quartz to unlock permanent upgrades. Each run is a fresh challenge - defeat enemies, swap skulls strategically, and survive as long as possible. Death means losing your current items and skulls, but your Dark Quartz remains for permanent progression!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, navigate menus
Space: Attack with current skull's ability
Z: Swap between collected skulls
Shift: Dash (quick evasive movement)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen after game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and combat mechanics. Validates that the player can move around the room, attack enemies, and interact with the game world properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move around the room using arrow keys, attack nearby enemies with space bar, and collect any items that drop. Test dash mechanics and ensure collision detection works correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves, attacks enemies, collects items, and navigates without getting stuck. No errors occur during basic gameplay interactions.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves, attacks enemies, collects items, and navigates without getting stuck. No errors occur during basic gameplay interactions.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal win strategy. Implements intelligent combat tactics to defeat enemies efficiently, collect skulls and items strategically, and progress through multiple rooms to achieve victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize collecting powerful skulls early, maintain safe distance while attacking, use dash to avoid damage, swap skulls based on enemy patterns, and systematically clear rooms while maximizing item collection.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully clears multiple rooms, defeats all enemies, collects items and skulls, and achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state by surviving and clearing enough rooms.

TEST_2.expected: Successfully clears multiple rooms, defeats all enemies, collects items and skulls, and achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state by surviving and clearing enough rooms.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests skull swapping mechanics and ability usage. Validates that skull collection, swapping between skulls, and using different skull abilities work correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Actively collect multiple skulls when they drop, frequently swap between them using Z key, and use each skull's unique attack pattern against enemies.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully collects multiple skulls, swaps between them smoothly, and each skull's unique abilities function as intended without errors.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests item collection and stat progression. Validates that items drop from enemies, can be collected, and properly enhance player stats.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Focus on defeating enemies and collecting all dropped items. Monitor stat changes and ensure buffs are applied correctly to player attributes.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Items drop consistently from defeated enemies, player successfully collects them, and stats increase appropriately. UI displays updated stats correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests death and progression systems. Validates game over conditions, Dark Quartz persistence, and proper state transitions between runs.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Allow player to take damage and reach game over state. Verify that Dark Quartz is retained, items/skulls are lost, and game can restart properly.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game correctly transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when HP reaches zero. Dark Quartz persists between runs while temporary items reset appropriately.
TEST_5.description: Tests death and progression systems. Validates game over conditions, Dark Quartz persistence, and proper state transitions between runs.
TEST_5.strategy: Allow player to take damage and reach game over state. Verify that Dark Quartz is retained, items/skulls are lost, and game can restart properly.
TEST_5.expected: Game correctly transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when HP reaches zero. Dark Quartz persists between runs while temporary items reset appropriately.
